Nasdaq - Individual Market Analysis

CoT signals and diagnostics for Nasdaq futures.

As of 2026-03-10

Gemini Summary

Signal Summary:

  • Configuration statement: Given a Spec Net %OI of 7.9%, a Spec Z-score of -0.289, and a 4-week flow of +3.3, this setup aligns with Upward-biased price paths and Normal volatility, where the dominant risk is Short covering / squeeze, not Trend continuation.
  • The signal has transitioned from an extreme bearish exhaustion regime into a Normal synthetic state characterized by a Balanced_Long_Bias market structure (1).
  • Conviction Band: Medium; Interpretation Confidence: High Confidence; Internal Conflict Flag: No. Signal Stability Assessment: Improving; Threshold Proximity: Moderate; Revision Sensitivity: Low.

Methodology Applied:

  • Speculator Z-Scores: Values ≤ -2 identify crowded short positioning and high upside convexity (1).
  • Flow Momentum: 4-week net flow serves as a lead indicator for trend sponsorship or fading conviction (1).
  • Price-Positioning Divergence: Used to identify bear traps when prices fall despite rising speculative buying (1).
  • Nasdaq-100 Consolidated CoT: Latest observation 2026-03-10 (1).

Key Dynamics:

  • The primary driver is the sharp reversal in speculative flow (Long_Build of +3.3) following a period of extreme short crowding (1).
  • Positioning is currently stabilizing as speculators re-engage with growth-beta exposure.
  • Conditional Invalidation: A return to negative 4-week flow while price remains stagnant would invalidate the recovery thesis.
  • Signal stability is Improving as it moves away from the 1-year extreme short levels observed on 2026-03-03 (1).

Scenario Balance:

  • Base Case dominant: Mean reversion continues toward neutral levels supported by positive flow momentum.
  • Upside risk: A non-linear short squeeze triggered by macro catalysts while positioning remains relatively light.
  • Downside risk: Renewed long reduction if growth factor exposure faces fresh real-rate headwinds.

Time Horizon & Aggregation:

  • Time Horizon: Tactical (weeks), as CoT flow shifts typically precede cyclical regime changes.
  • Aggregation Weight Hint: Medium, given the signal's sensitivity to liquidity and growth-duration factors.

Macro Relevance:

  • Informs growth-beta risk sentiment and speculative appetite for mega-cap concentration.
  • The economic mechanism is positioning-led liquidity: as shorts cover, it reduces downside convexity in growth indices.
  • Cycle position: Not determined.
  • Interacts typically with real rates and financial stress indices to flag regime fragility.

Regime Context:

  • The signal recently exited a "Crowded Short" regime (Spec Z-score -2.12 on 2026-03-03) and is currently in a Normal state (1).
  • Direction of change: Strengthening as speculators move from net-short to net-long territory.

Model Limitations:

  • Weekly reporting lag (CoT data is delayed) (1).
  • Momentum can persist at extremes longer than Z-scores suggest.

Data & References:

  • Nasdaq-100 Consolidated CoT (2026-03-10) (1).
  • Most influential: Spec_zscore (-0.289) and Flow_4w (+3.3) (1).
  • Additional data: Real 10Y yields and VXN volatility would improve reliability.
